## Description

<!-- What namespace(s) does this PR add or modify, and why? -->

## Checklist

### Metadata
- [ ] `org.name` is the full, human-readable organisation name
- [ ] `org.url` is a publicly reachable URL for the organisation
- [ ] At least one maintainer is listed with a valid GitHub username and email address

### Registers
- [ ] Every register URL is publicly reachable and returns a valid `register.json`
- [ ] Register slugs are lowercase and use hyphens (no spaces or underscores)
- [ ] No slug conflicts with existing entries in the same namespace

### Governance (modifications to an existing namespace)
- [ ] PR author is listed as a maintainer in the namespace being modified

### Validation
- [ ] The `validate` CI check passes
